ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or description of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the movie production */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Path to the movie poster */,
  "backdrop_path" TEXT /* Path to the movie backdrop */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Adventure, Fantasy) */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casts_crews" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "person_name" TEXT /* Name of the person */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the person */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the person */,
  "profile_path" TEXT /* Path to the person's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, content manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user (1-10) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user (1-10) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that has the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)
column_names: Overview or description of the movie
Runtime of the movie in minutes
Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Adventure, Fantasy)
Path to the person's profile image
Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, content manager)
ID of the movie being reviewed
ID of the user who wrote the review
ID of the movie being rated
ID of the user who gave the rating
